# WebWiz Studio — Full Content

> Full-text export of WebWiz Studio for AI ingestion. Generated by SeedSite.

## WebWiz — Your business deserves a better website.

URL: https://trywebwiz.com/

WebWiz — Your business deserves a better website. 

 ★ HAND-DESIGNED WEBSITES ★ FLAT $499 BUILD ★ CARE PLANS FROM $49/MO ★ UNLIMITED TRAFFIC ★ BACKED UP DAILY ★ MADE BY HUMANS 
 ★ HAND-DESIGNED WEBSITES ★ FLAT $499 BUILD ★ CARE PLANS FROM $49/MO ★ UNLIMITED TRAFFIC ★ BACKED UP DAILY ★ MADE BY HUMANS

 ★ A WEB STUDIO FOR SMALL BUSINESS 
 Your business deserves a better website. 
 Hand-designed by humans. Hosting, domain, and the boring bits — sorted. Flat $499. No surprises. 
 
 Start my site → 
 See how it works 

 M 
 J 
 R 
 + 
 
 140+ small businesses, online & on-brand 

 ★ FLAT $499 
 ★ NO CONTRACTS 
 ★ MADE BY HUMANS 
 ★ HOSTING INCLUDED 

 How it works. 
 Three steps from "I need a website" to "look at our beautiful website." Two weeks, start to finish. 

 1 
 Tell us about you. 
 A 15-minute call (or a form, if you'd rather). We learn what you do, who it's for, and how you want to feel about it. 

 2 
 We design & build. 
 You get a real, hand-designed site — not a template. Two rounds of revisions. We handle hosting, domain, email, the lot. 

 3 
 You go live. 
 We ship it, set up analytics, and hand you a tiny guide for making text edits yourself. Then we're a phone call away. 

 ★ ONE PRICE · NO ASTERISKS 
 Big agency quality. Small biz price. 
 
 ✓ Custom design — no templates, no AI sludge 
 ✓ Up to 6 pages, mobile-responsive 
 ✓ Delivered as ready-to-deploy files (or add a Care plan for hosting) 
 ✓ Two rounds of revisions, real human notes 
 ✓ Edit-it-yourself CMS for text & photos 

 ★ FLAT RATE 
 $ 499 
 All-in. Forever. No retainers. No "from". 
 Tap to see what's inside ↻ ★ 

 What's inside. 
 
 Discovery call & brand mini-brief 
 Custom design — desktop & mobile 
 Up to 6 pages, hand-built 
 Two revision rounds 
 Delivered as production-ready files (HTML/CSS/JS) 
 Hosting & domain: not included — add a Care plan or use your own 
 Analytics & SEO basics 
 Edit-yourself CMS & one-page guide 
 30 days of post-launch support 

 ↺ FLIP BACK 
 Get started → 

 ★ AFTER LAUNCH · MONTH-TO-MONTH 
 We keep it humming. 24/7. 
 Your site is too important to set-and-forget. Pick a care plan and never think about hosting, security, backups, or breakage again. Cancel anytime, no contracts, no nonsense. 

 ★ HOSTING & CARE 
 Always-on hosting. 
 $ 49 / month 
 The site lives, breathes, and stays bulletproof while you run your business. 
 
 ✓ Lightning-fast managed hosting 
 ✓ 24/7 security monitoring & malware scans 
 ✓ Automated daily backups · multi-region redundancy 
 ✓ Free SSL renewals & domain on us 
 ✓ Unlimited traffic — no overage fees, ever 
 ✓ 99.9% uptime · enterprise-grade infrastructure 
 ✓ Month-to-month · cancel anytime 
 
 Pick this plan → 

 ★ Most popular 
 ★ HOSTING & CARE + EDITS 
 Hosting + 10 edits a month. 
 $ 99 / month 
 Everything above, plus a designer on call to keep your site fresh. 
 
 ✓ Everything in Hosting & Care 
 ✓ 10 edits per month — text, photos, links, anything 
 ✓ Usually turned around same-day 
 ✓ Priority email & phone support 
 ✓ Seasonal banner & promo swaps included 
 ✓ Quarterly check-ins · we keep things sharp 
 ✓ Month-to-month · cancel anytime 
 
 Pick this plan → 

 ⛨ 
 Always secured. 
 24/7 firewall, malware scans, and brute-force protection — patched the moment threats appear. 

 ⟳ 
 Backed up daily. 
 Automated nightly backups stored across multiple regions. One-click restore — never lose a thing. 

 ⌬ 
 Multiple redundancies. 
 Failover servers across regions, geo-redundant CDN, and replicated databases. If one node falls, the site keeps shipping. 

 ∞ 
 Unlimited traffic. 
 Go viral on a Tuesday — we won't blink. No bandwidth caps, no overage bills, no surprises. Ever. 

 ★ NOTHING TO WORRY ABOUT · CANCEL ANYTIME · NO LONG-TERM CONTRACTS ★ 

 Kind words from kind humans. 
 From taquerías to joineries to a yoga studio that does brunch. The kind of folks we love designing for.

## Privacy Policy · WebWiz

URL: https://trywebwiz.com/privacy.html

Privacy Policy · WebWiz 

 WebWiz . 

 How it works 
 Pricing 
 Care plans 
 Kind words 
 
 Start a site &rarr; 

 &star; The legal stuff 
 Privacy policy. 
 Last updated: 9 May 2026 &middot; Effective: 9 May 2026 

 On this page 
 
 Who we are 
 What we collect 
 How we use it 
 Who we share with 
 Cookies & tracking 
 Security & storage 
 Retention 
 Your rights 
 Children 
 International transfers 
 Changes 
 Contact 

 The short version 
 We collect what we need to design, build, and host your website, plus take payment. We don't sell your data. We use trusted vendors (Stripe, our hosting provider, email tools) and we keep things locked down. If you want your data deleted, just ask.

 Who we are 
 "WebWiz," "we," "us," and "our" refer to WebWiz Studio, a small web design business operating in the United States. We build hand-designed websites for small businesses and offer ongoing hosting and care plans. This Privacy Policy explains what personal information we collect when you visit trywebwiz.com ("the Site") or hire us to build or host a website ("the Services"), and what we do with it. 
 By using the Site or the Services, you agree to the practices described here. If you don't agree, please don't use the Site or hire us. 

 Information we collect 

 Information you give us directly 
 
 Inquiry & project details: name, business name, email address, phone number, current website URL (if any), what your business does, design preferences, and anything else you submit through our contact or order forms. 
 Account & billing details: when you hire us, we collect billing name, billing address, and the last four digits of your payment card. Full card numbers are entered on Stripe's hosted checkout and never touch our servers. 
 Project content: any text, photos, logos, brand assets, login credentials, or files you share with us so we can build or maintain your site. 
 Communications: emails, voicemails, calendar invites, and chat messages you send to us. 

 Information collected automatically 
 
 Server logs: our hosting platform records IP addresses, browser type, pages requested, referring URL, and timestamps. This is standard infrastructure data used for security, abuse prevention, and uptime monitoring. 
 Cookies and similar tech: see Cookies & tracking below. 

 Information from third parties 
 
 Payment confirmations from Stripe: Stripe shares the result of each charge (success/decline), card brand, last four digits, and country, but not the full card number. 
 Domain registrars: when we register a domain on your behalf, the registrar may share registration details with us. 

 How we use your information 
 We use your information to do the work you've asked us to do. Specifically: 
 
 Respond to your inquiry and quote your project. 
 Design, build, deploy, and maintain your website. 
 Process payments and issue receipts and invoices. 
 Host your site, keep it secure, monitor uptime, and run backups. 
 Communicate with you about the project, retainers, renewals, outages, or changes to our terms. 
 Keep records for tax, accounting, and legal compliance. 
 Improve the Site and our Services (e.g., understanding which pages people read). 
 Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, or security incidents. 
 
 We don't use your information to train artificial intelligence models, run advertising networks, or build profiles of you for resale. 

 Who we share information with 
 We share personal information only with vendors who help us run the business and only as needed: 
 
 Stripe &mdash; payment processing. Stripe handles your card details under its own privacy policy: stripe.com/privacy . 
 Hosting and infrastructure providers &mdash; the servers your site runs on, including content delivery, SSL certificate issuance, and DNS. 
 Email and calendar providers &mdash; for client communication and scheduling. 
 Domain registrars &mdash; if we register a domain for you. 
 Accountants, bookkeepers, and tax authorities &mdash; as required to file taxes and keep records. 
 Lawyers or law enforcement &mdash; if we're legally required (subpoena, court order) or need to protect our rights or someone's safety. 
 Successors &mdash; if WebWiz is acquired, merged, or sold, your data may transfer to the buyer subject to this policy. 
 
 We don't sell, rent, or trade your personal information. Ever. 

 Cookies and tracking 
 Our marketing site (trywebwiz.com) uses minimal cookies. We may use: 
 
 Strictly necessary cookies for security, fraud prevention, and basic site function. 
 Analytics cookies to count visits and understand which pages are useful. These are aggregated and don't identify you personally. 
 
 If we ever add advertising or third-party social pixels, we'll add a cookie banner with opt-in controls. You can also block or delete cookies in your browser settings. Doing so may break some features on sites we host for you. 
 We honor "Do Not Track" and Global Privacy Control signals where reasonably possible. 

 Security and storage 
 We take reasonable steps to protect your information, including: 
 
 HTTPS (TLS) on every page we host. 
 Encrypted backups, geographically distributed. 
 Access controls and unique credentials for each team member. 
 Regular security patches and malware scans on hosted sites. 
 Two-factor authentication on critical accounts. 
 
 That said, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure. If a breach occurs that affects your information, we'll notify you and any required regulators in line with applicable law. 

 How long we keep your data 
 
 Inquiries: kept for up to 24 months, unless you ask us to delete sooner. 
 Active client records: kept for the life of the engagement plus 7 years for tax and accounting reasons. 
 Payment records: kept for as long as required by tax law (typically 7 years). 
 Site backups: kept for the life of your hosting plan plus 30 days after cancellation. 
 Server logs: rotated within 30 to 90 days. 

 Your privacy rights 
 Depending on where you live, you may have the right to: 
 
 Access the personal information we hold about you. 
 Correct inaccurate information. 
 Delete your information ("right to be forgotten"), subject to records we must keep for tax or legal reasons. 
 Receive a portable copy of your data. 
 Restrict or object to certain processing. 
 Withdraw consent at any time. 
 Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. 
 
 To exercise any of these rights, email hello@trywebwiz.com . We'll verify your identity and respond within 30 days. We won't charge you a fee or retaliate for making a request. 
 California residents: we don't sell or share your personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising as defined under the CCPA/CPRA. You may still submit a "Do Not Sell or Share" request via the contact above. 

 Children 
 The Site and Services are not directed to anyone under 16, and we don't knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we've collected information from a child, contact us and we'll delete it. 

 International data transfers 
 WebWiz is based in the United States. If you contact us from outside the US, your information will be transferred to and processed in the US, where data protection laws may differ from your country. By contacting us or using the Services, you consent to this transfer. 

 Changes to this policy 
 We may update this policy from time to time. When we do, we'll change the "Last updated" date at the top and, for material changes, post a notice on the homepage or email active clients. Continued use of the Services after a change means you accept the updated policy. 

 Contact us 
 Questions, requests, or complaints about privacy: 
 
 WebWiz Studio 
 Email: hello@trywebwiz.com 
 Web: trywebwiz.com 

 Not legal advice 
 This page is written in plain language and isn't a substitute for legal counsel. If you have a serious privacy or compliance question, talk to a lawyer.

 WebWiz . 
 A tiny design studio makin

---

## Start a site · WebWiz

URL: https://trywebwiz.com/start.html

Start a site · WebWiz 

 WebWiz . 

 How it works 
 Pricing 
 Care plans 
 Kind words 
 
 Start a site &rarr; 

 &star; Start a site 
 Tell us about your business. 
 Five minutes of questions, then pick a plan and pay. We'll be in touch shortly to get the details we need from you. 

 &star; Customizing Variant 1 
 What would you like to customize? 
 Tell us what to change — copy, layout, colors, sections to add or remove, photos to swap, anything at all. Your account manager will work through this list with you after kickoff. 

 Pick a plan. 

 &star; Build only 
 Just the files. 
 $ 499 one-time 
 Hand-designed site, delivered as ready-to-deploy files. You arrange your own hosting & domain. No ongoing support. 

 &star; Most popular 
 Build + Hosting & Care. 
 $ 499 + $49/mo 
 Site + always-on hosting: security, daily backups, SSL renewals, unlimited traffic, 99.9% uptime. Cancel anytime. 

 &star; Full service 
 Build + Care + Edits. 
 $ 499 + $99/mo 
 Everything above, plus 10 edits/month (text, photos, links). Usually same-day turnaround. 

 About you. 

 Business name 

 Your name 

 Email 

 Phone (optional) 

 Current website (optional) 
 
 Got a site we should look at? Drop the link. Don't have one? Skip it. 

 About your project. 

 What does your business do? 

 Who's it for? 

 Sites you like 

 Anything else? 

 Continue to secure checkout &rarr; 
 &star; Payments powered by Stripe &middot; SSL secured 
 By submitting, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy . $499 build is non-refundable once the kickoff call has happened. Care plan billing is monthly and cancellable anytime. 

 WebWiz . 
 A tiny design studio making beautiful websites for small businesses. We're in your corner.

## Terms of Service · WebWiz

URL: https://trywebwiz.com/terms.html

Terms of Service · WebWiz 

 WebWiz . 

 How it works 
 Pricing 
 Care plans 
 Kind words 
 
 Start a site &rarr; 

 &star; The legal stuff 
 Terms of service. 
 Last updated: 9 May 2026 &middot; Effective: 9 May 2026 

 On this page 
 
 The agreement 
 What we do 
 Pricing & payment 
 Refunds 
 Your part 
 Timeline & revisions 
 Hosting & care plans 
 Cancellation 
 Ownership & IP 
 Third-party tools 
 Acceptable use 
 Warranties 
 Limitation of liability 
 Indemnification 
 Termination 
 Disputes 
 Changes 
 Contact 

 The short version 
 Hire us to build a website for $499. Pay $49 or $99 per month if you want us to keep hosting and caring for it. Be honest with us, give us what we need, and we'll ship you a beautiful site. If something goes wrong, we'll work it out. The fine print below explains what to do when life gets weird.

 The agreement 
 These Terms of Service (the "Terms") form a binding agreement between you ("you," "your," or "Client") and WebWiz Studio ("WebWiz," "we," "us," or "our"). They govern your purchase and use of any services we offer, including website design and build, ongoing hosting, and care plans (together, "the Services"), and your use of trywebwiz.com (the "Site"). 
 By submitting an order, paying an invoice, or using the Services, you agree to these Terms. If you're agreeing on behalf of a company, you represent that you have the authority to bind that company. If you don't agree, don't use the Services. 

 What we do 
 WebWiz designs, builds, deploys, and (optionally) hosts and maintains custom websites for small businesses. The exact scope of any project is defined by: 
 
 The order form or quote you receive from us; 
 The plan you select (build only, build + Hosting & Care, or build + Hosting & Care + Edits); and 
 Any written change orders we agree to in writing or by email. 
 
 Anything outside that scope is "out of scope" and may require an additional fee or change order. 

 Pricing and payment 

 Build cost 
 The standard build is a flat $499 USD , payable in full at the time you place the order. The build cost includes everything described on our pricing page at the time of purchase. Custom work outside that scope is quoted separately. 

 Care plans 
 Our optional monthly care plans are billed in advance: 
 
 Hosting & Care &mdash; $49/month: managed hosting, security, backups, SSL, domain renewal (one .com or .co), and unlimited traffic. 
 Hosting & Care + Edits &mdash; $99/month: everything above plus up to 10 small edits per month (text, photos, links, simple swaps). Unused edits do not roll over. Edits are not transferable, refundable, or convertible to cash. Major redesigns or new pages aren't included; we'll quote those separately. 
 
 Care plans are month-to-month. You can cancel anytime; cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period. 

 Payment method 
 Payments are processed by Stripe. By placing an order, you authorize us (and Stripe) to charge your payment method for the amounts you've agreed to, including recurring charges if you've selected a care plan. You agree to keep your billing details current. If a charge fails, we'll notify you and may suspend the affected Services until you provide a working payment method. 

 Taxes 
 Prices do not include taxes unless stated. You're responsible for any sales tax, VAT, or other taxes that apply. 

 Late payment 
 If a recurring care plan charge fails for more than 14 days and we can't reach you, we may suspend hosting. If it fails for more than 60 days, we may archive the site and terminate the plan. Restoring an archived site after termination may require a reactivation fee. 

 Refund policy 
 
 Build cost: non-refundable once we've started discovery (the project kickoff). If you cancel before the kickoff call, we'll refund the full $499 minus any payment processing fees. 
 Care plans: non-refundable for the current month, but you can cancel anytime to stop the next charge. 
 Errors and double charges: always refundable. Just let us know. 

 Your part 
 To deliver the project on time and on budget, we need you to: 
 
 Give us accurate information about your business. 
 Provide brand assets (logo, photos, copy) in usable formats and on a reasonable timeline. If we have to wait longer than 30 days for content, the project may be paused, and a restart fee may apply when you're ready. 
 Confirm you own (or have a license to use) all content you give us, including text, images, logos, and trademarks. 
 Respond to revision requests within the project window. 
 Tell us if anything you submit is confidential. 

 Timeline and revisions 
 Most builds take about two weeks from kickoff to launch. The exact timeline depends on how quickly content and feedback come back to us. Each project includes two rounds of revisions . Additional rounds are billed at our then-current hourly rate; we'll quote you before doing the work. 
 "A revision" means changes to the design or copy on existing pages. New pages, new features, or net-new design directions are out of scope and quoted separately. 

 Hosting and care plans 
 If you choose a care plan, we host and maintain your site on infrastructure we manage. Our care plans include: 
 
 Managed hosting on enterprise-grade servers. 
 Automated daily backups stored across multiple regions. 
 Free SSL certificate renewal. 
 One free .com or .co domain renewal per year, while you're on a paid plan. 
 Unlimited bandwidth and traffic, subject to the Acceptable Use rules below. 
 24/7 security monitoring and patching. 
 
 We aim for 99.9% uptime , measured monthly, excluding scheduled maintenance and force majeure (see below). This is a goal, not a guarantee, and is not a service-level agreement (SLA). We don't offer credits or refunds for downtime unless we choose to in our discretion. 

 Cancellation 
 You may cancel a care plan anytime through email at hello@trywebwiz.com . On cancellation: 
 
 Service continues through the end of the current billing period. 
 You can request a copy of your site files within 30 days of cancellation. After 30 days, we may delete the files and backups. 
 If we registered a domain on your behalf, you can transfer it to another registrar at any time. We'll cooperate. 

 Ownership and intellectual property 
 Once your build is paid in full, you own the final design, copy you provided, and any custom code we wrote specifically for your site. Until then, all work product remains our property. 
 We retain ownership of: 
 
 Tools, frameworks, libraries, snippets, and components we created or use across multiple projects. 
 Our methodology and know-how. 
 Drafts, mockups, and unused concepts we didn't deliver. 
 The WebWiz brand, marks, and "Wizzy" mascot. 
 
 You grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to display screenshots and links to your live site in our portfolio, case studies, and marketing materials, unless you ask us in writing not to. 

 Third-party tools 
 Your site may rely on third-party services we don't control: domain registrars, payment processors (Stripe), font providers (Google Fonts), email forwarding, analytics, and others. We're not responsible for their outages, pricing changes, policy changes, or discontinuation. If a third-party service we depend on becomes unavailable, we'll do our best to swap in a replacement. 

 Acceptable use 
 You agree not to use the Services to: 
 
 Host or distribute illegal content, malware, phishing pages, or content that infringes someone else's rights. 
 Send unsolicited bulk email (spam) from infrastructure we manage. 
 Run cryptocurrency mining, torrenting nodes, ad networks, or proxy services. 
 Host adult content, gambling, or anything that violates our hosting provider's terms. 
 Resell our hosting to third parties without our written consent. 
 Attempt to reverse engineer, attack, or interfere with our infrastructure. 
 
 "Unlimited traffic" means we don't meter normal business traffic. We reserve the right to reasonab
